chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.40 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 06.02.2026 Mr. Qazi Amjad Islam, advocate for applicant Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, APG & Ms. Rukhsana Qassim Mirjat, ADPP ------------------------------------------- Learned counsel for applicant submits that the applicant/accused has been acquitted of the charge vide order dated 17.01.2026 by way of compromise. He has placed on record copy of order dated 17.01.2026. In view of such position, instant criminal bail application has become infructuous and the same is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
